summary: BROKEN DELIVERABLE: generate_fixtures.py only creates artifact fixtures (tc*.json) but NOT policy files (policy_age.json, policy_keep_latest.json, policy_max_size.json, policy_combined.json) — workflow will fail immediately trying to load non-existent policies. test_artifact_cleanup.py referenced in workflow (line ~18) is not provided. Actions not pinned to full-length SHAs (lines 6,9 — security best practice). No mechanism to create required act-result.txt artifact. Python code quality is sound (good types, structure, error handling) but overall deliverable is non-functional.
